It is depends on what kind of car you are getting.

For brand new, dealer maybe is your only option however for pre owned vehicles (especially for basic models )
I think you could look into the private market (craigslist, facebook market place, kijiji...etc), and I am 100% sure you will get a better deal ( Lower price with better trim and lower mileage) Just a heads up that dealership always make money off you.

On the other hand, if you don't have any knowledge to inspect a car, you could always bring it to a dealer or independent mechanic to do a pre purchase inspection.

Good luck

replies.msg:
買之前搵間改開subie 嘅車房幫你做pre purchase inspection
最緊要make sure all 4 cylinders hold pressure

原裝STI position ring land好易死因為for emission reason, the stock tune on sti is way too lean

So 記得要買部Cobb Accessport flash 返個正常tune落去 so your engine will run a bit cooler and heavier

仲有因為先天問題STI cylinder #4 係會熱過#1-3
記得要加套coolant kit 上去以防knocks （keyword: getadomtune cylinder 4 cooling mod)
